---
title: "Data & Visualization Tools"
---

## Programming Languages

- **Object-oriented:** Python, C#
- **Statistics/computation:** R, MATLAB
- **ML/AI:** Scikit-Learn, Tensorflow

## Data Management

- SQL

## Simulation & Optimization

- SUMO
- Flow
- GAMS
- AMPL

## Visualization & Mapping

- Vega-Lite
- QGIS

## Version Control

- Git

## Additional Tools

- LaTeX: For academic writing and documentation

### Video Analysis

- ANVIL video coding software
- Datavyu

### 3D Modeling and Animation

- Unity/3D
- Unreal Engine
- Blender
- MotionBuilder
- MOTIVE
- ISAT (miniSim)
